plan_section: Step 6: Delegate the utilities visual redesign and interaction polish to native Opus UI

plan_alignment.notes: Changes are visual/component markup polish in the planned files and preserve the tools hub, shared shell, generated provenance, and serial safety contracts. Verification documents the required co-ui delegation.

correctness_safety.notes: Serial disabled states, preview/apply gating, confirmation flow, unsupported-browser banner, and critical test IDs remain intact. No iframe/proxy behavior or runtime vendor reads were introduced.

code_quality.notes: The refactor consolidates repeated hub section headings with a local SectionHeader helper and keeps component structure readable. Styling remains consistent with existing design-system classes.

completeness.notes: Automated verification covers typecheck, lint, unit, build, targeted e2e, and a11y. Manual validation covered the tools hub, serial unsupported/no-connection behavior, and redirect rendering.

patterns.notes: Implementation follows existing HeroPanel, SectionEyebrow, ToolCard, panel, and button patterns while preserving public route and generated provenance usage.

integration.notes: Imports and component usage are consistent. Staged files match the provided review scope, and the shared ToolShell polish should integrate cleanly with existing tool pages.
